headline: 《后室》热潮持续，《痴迷》本周登顶
headlineEn: Backrooms Fever Continues, Obsession Tops This Week
summary: 本周娱乐热点：《痴迷》登顶热搜，《后室》热度不减。《海洋奇缘：启航》与《奥德赛》持续受关注。
summaryEn: This week's entertainment highlights: Obsession tops trending, Backrooms remains hot. Moana: Voyage and Odyssey continue to draw attention.

industryHighlights.text: 《奥德赛》等新片定档，影迷期待
industryHighlights.en: Odyssey and others set release dates, fans excited

industryHighlights.text: 《权力的游戏前传：龙族》持续热播
industryHighlights.en: Game of Thrones prequel: House of the Dragon continues to air

industryHighlights.text: 《末日地堡》本周跻身热搜前十
industryHighlights.en: Silo enters top 10 trending this week
